nasb.text: This is a plain indication of God’s righteous judgment so that you will be considered worthy of the kingdom of God, for which indeed you are suffering.

esv.text: This is evidence of the righteous judgment of God, that you may be considered worthy of the kingdom of God, for which you are also suffering—

cnv.text: 這正是　神公義判斷的明證，使你們可以算是配得上他的國；你們也是為了　神的國而受苦。

ccb.text: 你们这种表现正是上帝公义审判的明证，使你们配进上帝的国，你们正在为这国受苦。

csbs.text: 这正是神公义审判的证据，好使你们算是配得上神的国；你们也正是为此而受苦害的。
